description: Create a custom state-list drawable for a Login button in the 'LoginUI' project. Define a selector in res/drawable/login_button_bg.xml with a pressed state using solid color #1565C0 and 16dp rounded corners, and a default state using solid color #2196F3 and 16dp rounded corners. Apply this drawable to the button with ID @+id/login_button in activity_main.xml. Ensure the custom background is visible by setting the button's backgroundTint to @null to prevent Material theme overrides.
